content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run an Engineering discovery session. New line or retrofit?
New line addition in our existing facility.
15mL airless pump. Gel-cream viscosity, room temperature fill.
Compressed air and chilled water. No steam at that location.
Full IQ/OQ/PQ required for FDA compliance. We're a cGMP facility.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
